chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 1543 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.02.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Noorul Amin Sipio, Advocate for applicant Mr. Mansoor Ali Chandio, Advocate for Complainant Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. Learned counsel does not press this bail application as according to him the trial court has acquitted the applicant. Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
